module.title: Dashboard
module.noAccess: You don't have permission to view the dashboard.

pipeline.title: Work-Order Pipeline
pipeline.subtitle: Cart count at every production stage, grouped by product → work order.
pipeline.empty: No carts in the pipeline yet.
pipeline.passedNote: Stage mapping — Created: created · Dry Room: drying / room-temp drying / awaiting recheck · Waiting Test: checked out, not yet sampled · Sampled: sampled / inspecting / awaiting group result · Passed / Release: passed (these carts are the ones waiting to be released) · Retest / Hold: failed, awaiting disposition · Released: released to packaging, waiting packing · Dispatched: handed to packing.

forecast.title: Drying-Room Exit Forecast
forecast.subtitle: Carts still drying, grouped by the day they are expected to leave the dryer.
